samples.xml_description:
<module id="edge_detect">
    <description>Edge detection module for detecting rising and falling edges of input signal a.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="a">Input signal to detect edges.</input>
        <output id="rise">Output signal indicating a rising edge.</output>
        <output id="down">Output signal indicating a falling edge.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>
        Always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                rise <= 0;
                down <= 0;
            end else begin
                if (a && !prev_a) begin
                    rise <= 1;
                    down <= 0;
                end else if (!a && prev_a) begin
                    rise <= 0;
                    down <= 1;
                end else begin
                    rise <= 0;
                    down <= 0;
                end
            end
        end
    </implementation>
</module>
